common.tagline: Ship from the US to Haiti — fast, safe, transparent.

hero.eyebrow: From the US to Haiti — fast, safe, transparent.
hero.title: Track a package
hero.subtitle: Enter the PGFI tracking number or the carrier number from the store where the package came from.

actions.title: What can we help you with?

send.title: Send a package
send.desc: Use our services to send your packages between the US and Haiti — by air or by sea.

shop.title: Online purchase
shop.desc: Use your free US address to shop on Amazon, eBay, Shein and any US store. We forward to Haiti.

addresses.title: Our addresses
addresses.desc: Find our warehouses in the US and our branches across Haiti — easy to locate and visit.

calculator.title: Calculator
calculator.desc: Estimate shipping cost based on weight or dimensions, plus the FOB value of your goods.

how.title: How to send packages with PGFI Shipping
how.p1: Create a free account to receive a personalized US shipping address you can use anywhere online. Track every step of your package, get notified by email, and pay online or at the branch.
how.p2: When your package arrives in Haiti, pick it up at the branch you selected. Your shipping history, invoices and labels stay in your dashboard.

s1.title: Sign up
s1.desc: Create a free account and receive your US address.

s2.title: Shop
s2.desc: Use your US address as the shipping address on any US store.

s3.title: We receive
s3.desc: We collect, weigh and prepare your packages in Miami.

s4.title: Pick up in Haiti
s4.desc: Pick up at our branches in Port-au-Prince (PAP) or Cap-Haïtien (CAP).

stats.title: Delivery between the US and Haiti
stats.subtitle: Whether by plane or by boat, we are there for you.

app.title: Download the PGFI app
app.desc: Track your packages in real time, scan invoices with your camera, pay from your wallet and access all the same features as the web.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: We've listed the most common questions below.
faq.q1: How can I track my package?
faq.a1: Once your package is received in our US warehouse, you'll receive a confirmation email with a PGFI tracking number. Use it on the Track page or in your dashboard to follow every step.
faq.q2: How do I create an account?
faq.a2: Click "Sign up" on the top right and create a free personal account. You'll instantly get a US shipping address you can use anywhere online.
faq.q3: What forms of payment do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept MonCash, NatCash, PayMon, bank transfers and gift cards. Once funds are credited to your wallet, you can pay any shipment in one click.
faq.a4: Air shipments typically arrive in 7–15 days after they reach our US warehouse. Sea shipments take 30–45 days. Express options are available on request.
faq.a5: Your package is automatically protected up to the declared FOB value, within our terms. For higher coverage, contact support before the package leaves the US warehouse.
faq.q6: How is the shipping rate calculated?
faq.a6: Our rate uses the actual weight (LBS) or the dimensional weight (L × W × H), whichever is greater. Use our Calculator to get an instant estimate.

cta.title: Ready to ship smarter?
cta.subtitle: Sign up in 60 seconds and start receiving US packages in Haiti.

track.title: Track your package
track.subtitle: Enter your tracking code (PG-XXXXXX) or carrier number.

calculator.title: Shipping calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate the cost to ship from the US to Haiti.
calculator.dimsHelp: Dimensions are optional but used for air shipments to compute dimensional weight.

addresses.title: Your free US address
addresses.subtitle: Use this address as the shipping address on any US online store.
addresses.tip: Don't forget to include your customer code (e.g. ARI-001234) in the address — that's how we route your package to your account.
addresses.ctaSignup: Sign up to get your code

about.title: About PGFI Shipping
about.intro: PGFI Shipping helps the Haitian community in the US and abroad receive packages reliably in Haiti, with transparent pricing and real-time tracking.
about.mission: Make cross-border shipping affordable, predictable and respectful of our customers' time.
about.v2: Care for every package, every time.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: By using PGFI Shipping, you agree to these terms. We provide package forwarding from our US warehouses to delivery branches in Haiti.
terms.p2: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide and for keeping your password safe.
terms.p3: Hazardous materials, weapons, drugs and other items prohibited by law cannot be shipped.
terms.p4: Prices are calculated based on weight (or dimensional weight, whichever is greater) and the service type. Taxes and fees may apply.
terms.p5: Our liability is limited to the declared value of the package, up to the maximum permitted by law.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We collect only the data we need to operate the service: contact information, addresses, and shipment history.
privacy.p2: Account data (name, email, phone), shipment data (tracking, weight, contents declaration), and payment metadata (we never store full card numbers).
privacy.p3: To provide the service, communicate about your shipments, and improve our operations.
privacy.p4: You can export or delete your data from the dashboard or by contacting support.

support.title: Contact support
support.subtitle: We typically reply within one business day.
support.name: Your name
